attributes.action: provide funding, encourage dentists to reopen their lists for NHS patients.
attributes.background:
I want the government to provide funding and encourage dentists to reopen their lists for NHS patients. 
The average working class cannot afford treatment resulting in poor heath and suffering

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Increase funding for NHS dentists and the NHS dentistry system
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/743481
